title: Chapter 33 chapter 4 Monetary Benefits
description: The Post-9/11 GI Bill provides financial support for education and housing to service members, veterans, and eligible dependents attending education and training programs taken at colleges or universities, and through non-college degree (NCD) programs at other institutions.
keywords: Monetary benefits, Post 9/11 Bill, Tuition and fees, Housing allowance, Books and supplies stipend, Additional benefits, Reimbursements of fees, Overpayments,
